ListItem.Para: Inoperative relay is deactivated.
Opposite system channel is verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative landing gear control RESET RELAY and verify opposite system channel operates normally (AMM DDG 32-31-02).

ListItem.Para: Identify the inoperative RESET RELAY on LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 2. The inoperative RESET RELAY (SYS 1 or SYS 2) will have a blank status field.
Deactivate control relay.
For an inoperative RESET RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LG SYS-ENABLE 1 and lock with an INOP tag.
For an inoperative RESET RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker LG SYS-ENABLE 2 and lock with an INOP tag.
Verify opposite system channel operates normally.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.

ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative on one system channel provided:

ListItem.Para: Inoperative relay is deactivated.
Opposite system channel is verified to operate normally.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 32-31-03-01.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative landing gear control relay and verify opposite system channel operates normally (AMM DDG 32-31-02).

ListItem.Para: Identify the inoperative relay.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.

ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.

Identify the inoperative relay on LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 2. Inoperative control relays will have a blank status field. One main landing gear control relay of each type may be inoperative. All inoperative relays must be on the same system.
Deactivate control relay.
For an inoperative BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG BYPASS VLV-ENABLE 1

Note.Para: Status message MLG BYPASS SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG DOOR CTRL VLV CLOSE-1

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG L DR SAFE VLV-NORM CLOSE 1

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL L will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG R DR SAFE VLV-NORM CLOSE 1

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL R will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG BYPASS VLV-ENABLE 2

Note.Para: Status message MLG BYPASS SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG DOOR CTRL VLV CLOSE-2

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG L DR SAFE VLV-NORM CLOSE 2

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL L will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG R DR SAFE VLV-NORM CLOSE 2

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL R will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG CTRL VLV-DN1

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOWN SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG CTRL VLV-UP1

Note.Para: Status message MLG UP SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
MLG CTRL VLV-DN2

Note.Para: Status message MLG DOWN SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: MLG CTRL VLV-UP2

Note.Para: Status message MLG UP SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Verify opposite system channel operates normally.
For an inoperative main landing gear BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the pressure for MLG SYS is approximately the same pressure as the CENTER SYS.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN Maintenance page, confirm that the MLG SYS pressure decreases to less than 500 psi.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
Confirm that GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
For an inoperative main landing gear NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL Maintenance page 2, verify the remaining relay status shows INHIBIT in the status field.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL Maintenance page 2, verify the remaining relay status shows NOT INHIBIT in the status field.
Confirm that GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
For an inoperative main landing gear GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Install four truck stow sensors slugs to NEAR.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Set the landing gear control lever UP
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL maintenance page, confirm remaining relay status display INHIBIT DN.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL maintenance page, confirm remaining relay status display INHIBIT UP.
Confirm that GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove the four truck stow sensor slugs.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative on one system channel provided:

ListItem.Para: Inoperative relay is deactivated.
Opposite system channel is verified to operate normally.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 32-31-03-02.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative landing gear control relay and verify opposite system channel operates normally (AMM DDG 32-31-02).

ListItem.Para: Identify the inoperative relay.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.

ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.

Identify the inoperative relay on LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 2. Inoperative control relays will have a blank status field. One nose landing gear control relay of each type may be inoperative. All inoperative relays must be on the same system.
Deactivate control relay.
For an inoperative BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
NLG BYPASS VLV-ENABLE 1

Note.Para: Status message NLG BYPASS SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: NLG DOOR CTRL VLV CLOSE-1

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOOR CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker NLG DR SAFE VLV NORM CLOSE-1 and lock with INOP tag.

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
NLG BYPASS VLV-ENABLE 2

Note.Para: Status message NLG BYPASS SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: NLG DOOR CTRL VLV CLOSE-2

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOOR CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker NLG DR SAFE VLV NORM CLOSE-2 and lock with INOP tag.

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOOR NORM CLOSE SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
NLG CTRL VLV-DN1

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOWN SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: NLG CTRL VLV-UP1

Note.Para: Status message NLG UP SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: For an inoperative GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY on system 2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with INOP tags.
NLG CTRL VLV-DN2

Note.Para: Status message NLG DOWN SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: NLG CTRL VLV-UP2

Note.Para: Status message NLG UP SOL will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Verify opposite system channel operates normally.
For an inoperative nose landing gear BYPASS/DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the pressure for NLG SYS is approximately the same pressure as the CENTER SYS.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the NLG SYS pressure decreases to less than 500 psi.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
For an inoperative nose landing gear NORM DR CLOSE CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL Maintenance page 2, verify the remaining relay status shows INHIBIT in the status field.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL Maintenance page 2, verify the remaining relay status shows NOT INHIBIT in the status field.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
For an inoperative nose landing gear GEAR CTRL CMD INHIBIT RELAY:

ListItem.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.
ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL maintenance page, confirm remaining relays status shows INHIBIT DN.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
On the LNDG GEAR CONTROL maintenance page, confirm remaining relays status shows INHIBIT UP.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
